zh.lifeSummary: Patrick Gilchrist是John Gilchrist和Janet Thomsone的兒子，於1587年5月26日出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾加根諾可。他於1605年5月29日與Mairgerie Killicross在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安結婚。他去世於1616年3月23日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾加根諾可享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Patrick Gilchrist是John Gilchrist和Janet Thomsone的儿子，于1587年5月26日出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾加根諾可。他于1605年5月29日与Mairgerie Killicross在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安结婚。他去世于1616年3月23日在苏格兰斯林史爾加根諾可享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gilchrist
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (western) and Irish (Down): from Gaelic Mac Giolla Chríosd, Mac Gille Chríosd ‘son of the servant of Christ’.

variants.name: Kilcrease
meanings: History: Robert Kilcrease (c. 1750–1808) came from Scotland(probably Kilmarnock) to Edgefield, SC, c. 1770.

variants.name: Gilchrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilkerson
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chrìosd ‘son of Gille Chrìosd' (see Gilchrist ).

variants.name: Gilkey
meanings: Irish (northern): possibly a pet form of the Scottishpersonal name   Gilchrist  .

variants.name: Gilcrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilcrease
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Gilchrist  .

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: Patrick Gilchrist was born on 26 May 1587, in Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of John Gilchrist and Janet Thomsone. He married Mairgerie Killicross on 29 May 1605, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 23 March 1616, in Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Patrick Gilchrist est né le 26 mai 1587, à Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils de John Gilchrist et Janet Thomsone. Il a épousé Mairgerie Killicross le 29 mai 1605, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 23 mars 1616, à Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Patrick Gilchrist wurde am 26. Mai 1587 in Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John Gilchrist und Janet Thomsone geboren. Er hat am 29. Mai 1605 in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Mairgerie Killicross geheiratet. Er starb am 23. März 1616 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Patrick Gilchrist è nato il il 26 maggio 1587 nel Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlio di John Gilchrist e Janet Thomsone. Lui sposato Mairgerie Killicross il 29 maggio 1605, nel Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 23 marzo 1616, nel Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Patrick Gilchristは1587年5月26日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアガーグノックでJohn GilchristとJanet Thomsoneの息子として生まれた。1605年5月29日にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンでMairgerie Killicrossと結婚した。彼は1616年3月23日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアガーグノックで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Patrick Gilchrist(은)는 1587년 5월 26일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 가건옥크에서 John Gilchrist(와)과 Janet Thomsone의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1605년 5월 29일 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 Mairgerie Killicross(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1616년 3월 23일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 가건옥크에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.26 May 1587–23 March 1616: 26 de maio de 1587–23 de março de 1616
pt.lifeSummary: Patrick Gilchrist nasceu em 26 de maio de 1587, em Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filho de John Gilchrist e Janet Thomsone. Ele casou-se com Mairgerie Killicross em 29 de maio de 1605, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 23 de março de 1616, em Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Patrick Gilchrist родился 26 мая 1587 г. в местности гаргуннокк, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John Gilchrist и Janet Thomsone. Он женился на женщине по имени Mairgerie Killicross 29 мая 1605 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 23 марта 1616 г. в местности гаргуннокк, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 28 лет.

es.26 May 1587–23 March 1616: 26 de mayo de 1587–23 de marzo de 1616
es.lifeSummary: Patrick Gilchrist nació el 26 de mayo de 1587, en Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hijo de John Gilchrist y Janet Thomsone. Se casó con Mairgerie Killicross el 29 de mayo de 1605, en Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1616, en Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 28 años.
